data.description: Routes an input message using LLM-based categorization.

custom_prompt.info: Additional instructions for LLM-based categorization. These will be added to the base prompt. Use {input_text} for the input text and {routes} for the available categories.
custom_prompt.name: custom_prompt
custom_prompt.value: Send to HR route if the document is a resume and should go to the HR team. Send to Legal if the document is a contract or agreement.

enable_else_output.info: Include an Else output for cases that don't match any route.
enable_else_output.name: enable_else_output

input_text.info: The primary text input for the operation.
input_text.name: input_text

message.info: Optional override message that will replace both the Input and Output Value for all routes when filled.
message.name: message

routes.info: Define the categories for routing. Each row should have a route/category name and optionally a custom output value.
routes.name: routes

data.description: Load a file to be used in your project.

concurrency_multithreading.info: When multiple files are being processed, the number of files to process concurrently.
concurrency_multithreading.name: concurrency_multithreading

delete_server_file_after_processing.info: If true, the Server File Path will be deleted after processing.
delete_server_file_after_processing.name: delete_server_file_after_processing

file_path.info: Data object with a 'file_path' property pointing to server file or a Message object with a path to the file. Supercedes 'Path' but supports same file types.
file_path.name: file_path

ignore_unspecified_files.info: If true, Data with no 'file_path' property will be ignored.
ignore_unspecified_files.name: ignore_unspecified_files

ignore_unsupported_extensions.info: If true, files with unsupported extensions will not be processed.
ignore_unsupported_extensions.name: ignore_unsupported_extensions

path.info: Supported file extensions: txt, md, mdx, csv, json, yaml, yml, xml, html, htm, pdf, docx, py, sh, sql, js, ts, tsx, sqlite; optionally bundled in file extensions: zip, tar, tgz, bz2, gz
path.name: path

separator.info: Specify the separator to use between multiple outputs in Message format.
separator.name: separator

silent_errors.info: If true, errors will not raise an exception.
silent_errors.name: silent_errors

use_multithreading.info: Set 'Processing Concurrency' greater than 1 to enable multithreading.
use_multithreading.name: use_multithreading

data.description: Create or update knowledge in Langflow.

allow_duplicates.info: Allow duplicate rows in the knowledge base
allow_duplicates.name: allow_duplicates

api_key.info: API key for the embedding provider to generate embeddings.
api_key.name: api_key

column_config.info: Configure column behavior for the knowledge base.
column_config.name: column_config

input_df.info: Table with all original columns (already chunked / processed). Accepts Data or DataFrame. If Data is provided, it is converted to a DataFrame automatically.
input_df.name: input_df

knowledge_base.info: Select the knowledge to load data from.
knowledge_base.name: knowledge_base

data.description: Split text into chunks based on specified criteria.

chunk_overlap.info: Number of characters to overlap between chunks.
chunk_overlap.name: chunk_overlap

chunk_size.info: The maximum length of each chunk. Text is first split by separator, then chunks are merged up to this size. Individual splits larger than this won't be further divided.
chunk_size.name: chunk_size

data_inputs.info: The data with texts to split in chunks.
data_inputs.name: data_inputs

keep_separator.info: Whether to keep the separator in the output chunks and where to place it.
keep_separator.name: keep_separator

separator.name: separator

text_key.info: The key to use for the text column.
text_key.name: text_key

data.description: Split text into chunks based on specified criteria.

chunk_overlap.info: Number of characters to overlap between chunks.
chunk_overlap.name: chunk_overlap

chunk_size.info: The maximum length of each chunk. Text is first split by separator, then chunks are merged up to this size. Individual splits larger than this won't be further divided.
chunk_size.name: chunk_size

data_inputs.info: The data with texts to split in chunks.
data_inputs.name: data_inputs

keep_separator.info: Whether to keep the separator in the output chunks and where to place it.
keep_separator.name: keep_separator

separator.name: separator

text_key.info: The key to use for the text column.
text_key.name: text_key

data.description: Create or update knowledge in Langflow.

allow_duplicates.info: Allow duplicate rows in the knowledge base
allow_duplicates.name: allow_duplicates

api_key.info: API key for the embedding provider to generate embeddings.
api_key.name: api_key

column_config.info: Configure column behavior for the knowledge base.
column_config.name: column_config

input_df.info: Table with all original columns (already chunked / processed). Accepts Data or DataFrame. If Data is provided, it is converted to a DataFrame automatically.
input_df.name: input_df

knowledge_base.info: Select the knowledge to load data from.
knowledge_base.name: knowledge_base

data.description: Runs a language model given a specified provider.

base_url_ibm_watsonx.info: The base URL of the API (IBM watsonx.ai only)
base_url_ibm_watsonx.name: base_url_ibm_watsonx

input_value.info: The input text to send to the model
input_value.name: input_value

max_tokens.info: Maximum number of tokens to generate. Field name varies by provider.
max_tokens.name: max_tokens

ollama_base_url.info: Endpoint of the Ollama API (Ollama only). Defaults to http://localhost:11434
ollama_base_url.name: ollama_base_url

project_id.info: The project ID associated with the foundation model (IBM watsonx.ai only)
project_id.name: project_id

system_message.info: A system message that helps set the behavior of the assistant
system_message.name: system_message
